Standard Racial Traits

  • Ability Score Modifiers: Scythians are deadly markmen and masters in the art of war but their intimidating scales put others off. Scythians gain +2 bonus to Dexterity and Wisdom but a -2 Charisma
  • Type: Scythians are Humanoid creatures with both the Scythian subtype.
  • Size: Scythians are Medium creatures and thus receive no bonuses or penalties due to their size.
  • Base Speed: Humans have a base speed of 30 feet.
  • Languages: Scythians begin play speaking Common and the Scythian language . Scythians with high Intelligence scores can choose Cyclops, Elven, Gnoll, Goblin, Orc, Sylcan.

Racial Traits

  • Born Rider Scythians Gain the Mounted Combat feat without needing to meet the prerequisites.
  • Marksmen (Ex) Scythians are experts at range combat and reduce the penalty of shooting beyond their first range increment by 1 for each full range increment between you and your target
  • Trained Riders (Ex) Scythians are trained to ride mouns gaining a +2 bonus to Handle Animal and Ride checks.
  • Weapon Familiarity: Scythians Treat Composite and Regular shortbows as Simple Weapons, and treat the Bolas, Lasso and Horsebow as martial weapons.

Alternate Racial Traits

  • Venom Blooded: A number of times per day equal to his Constitution modifier (minimum 1/day), a Scythian can envenom a weapon that he wields with his toxic saliva or blood (using blood requires the vishkanya to be injured when he uses this ability). Applying venom in this way is a swift action. Vishkanya Venom: Injury; save Fort DC 10 + 1/2 the vishkanya’s Hit Dice + the vishkanya’s Constitution modifier; frequency 1/round for 6 rounds; effect 1d2 Dex; cure 1 save. This ability replaces Born Rider.

  • Poison use: Scythian are skilled in the use of poison and never accidentally poison themselves when using or applying poison. this replaces Marksmen.

  • Snake Charmer; Snakes, Vipers, Pythons and similar creatures are naturally bonded with some Scythians. A Scythian is treated as one level higher when determining the abilities of your animal companion, familiar, or mount. This Replaces Weapon Familiarity.
